note: publish V13 RC1 operator notice and public RC manifest link. (A) website/sost-explorer.html: new amber-banded static V13 RC1 OPERATOR NOTICE panel inserted between the V12 countdown banner and the green V11+V12 LIVE / SbPoW banner. Static HTML / no JS / no fetch / no XMLHttpRequest / no WebSocket / no EventSource / no sendBeacon / no wallet-sign-broadcast UI. Panel content: rc_id v13-rc1, activation height 12000, fallback height 15000 (V15 proposed final hardfork, not guaranteed), DTD lottery decision height 12100, NTP MANDATORY post-V13 warning (clock not >10 s ahead = blocks rejected), full list of four confirmed items (all cASERT equalizer profiles E7-H35 active via effective_profile_ceiling_at + validator_profile_ceiling_at + CASERT_MAX_ACTIVE_PROFILE_V13; DTD lottery cooldown 5->6 via lottery_exclusion_window_at; future-timestamp drift cap 60s->10s via max_future_drift_at; Beacon Phase II-A gated at BEACON_PHASE2A_ACTIVATION_HEIGHT = V13_HEIGHT), full list of four fallback V15 items with reasons (PoPC Model A+B no-half-shipping; Beacon II-B expiration+threshold-sig+mirror+revocation+severity; Beacon III P2P gossip; Memory-Lock per-instance the second anti-pool besides SbPoW), DTD lottery decision-at-12100 framing (Option A keep / Option B disable, community-driven not unilateral), Beacon loudspeaker-not-remote-control safety paragraph, four-tile side panel (miner upgrade sequence / SbPoW unchanged / troubleshooting rejected blocks post-V13 / public RC manifest paths), and a closing What-V13-does-NOT-change paragraph re-asserting Useful Compute rewards POSTPONED (post #133 invariant unchanged). (B) website/sost-protocol-spec.html: compact V13 RC1 status block inserted between the hero section and the table of contents. One-paragraph summary of the four confirmed items + four fallback V15 items + Beacon safety model, followed by a path-reference line pointing to /api/v13_release_candidate.json + docs/V13_RELEASE_CANDIDATE.md + docs/V13_MINER_OPERATOR_CHECKLIST.md + docs/V13_ACTIVATION_PLAN.md + docs/V13_READINESS_GATES.md. No JS, no fetch. (C) website/api/explorer_version.json bumped v266 -> v267 with this note. Pure HTML/text edit. Zero src/, zero schemas, zero scripts, zero tests, zero consensus, zero wallet/payment/broadcast changes. Trinity Useful Compute rewards remain POSTPONED. sost-trinity.html and trinity-useful-compute.html are NOT modified in this bump (they already point at the correct V13 narrative through v264-v266). The on-chain V13 hardfork itself does not depend on this JSON or these HTML edits; the website surface is published purely for human/operator convenience so anyone can read what activates at block 12,000 and what falls back to V15 without cloning the repo.
